_scope: M-ID + Cluster only (singletons excluded; C-ID/CCN reference anchors excluded)
_mc_excludes_note: M-IDs intentionally do not claim transferability (that's TMC territory, requiring CIAC intersegmental approval). Including these in MC scoring would muddy the waters and reintroduce the UC-defaults trap M-IDs were designed to avoid.
